top_signals.title: Jim Cramer sees a big risk to the bull market resurfacing — and it's not the Iran war
top_signals.summary: CNBC's Jim Cramer said the growing wave of stock offerings and debt issuance is the next big threat to the bull market.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: AI boom fuels inflation fears, complicating Fed’s next rate move
top_signals.summary: Ongoing strong demand for AI infrastructure “would likely sustain upward pressure on prices for technology products and electricity,” Federal Reserve policymakers said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: China Asks Bankers to Avoid Underwriting Short-Term LGFV Bonds
top_signals.summary: China is steering municipal borrowers away from issuing short-term bonds in the domestic market, according to people familiar with the matter, in its latest bid to curb fundraising by weaker issuers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Jim Cramer says this 'self-help story' is a long-term buy after a 25% pullback
top_signals.summary: The Investing Club holds its "Morning Meeting" every weekday at 10:20 a.m. ET.
